overlay.description: Backdrop dimming behind the panel — same alias token used for modal dimming (node 47:13869 confirms the drawer reuses it, not a drawer-specific color)

right.description: Only the right-side elevation is wired up — Figma's Drawer component (47:8675) has no Position property/variant, only Size, so left/top/bottom stay unused pre-seeded entries in alias.elevation.drawer until a real swatch demonstrates them
